title: Small TotemPop
description: A Simple Texture pack that makes the pop particles clean and small. Nothing more
body:
**Small Totem Pop**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Makes totem pop particles half the size they usually are in vanilla. this allows you to see clearly while still having the particles Particle texture is the exact same (Vanilla) just smaller. ---
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MWDqWItc/images/ecd334864d7310b6ec3e38fe150383f42e35d815.gif) _As you can see in this Pack VS Vanilla the pack particles are half the size!_
--- Tired of the particles blocking your screen? Just use this pack and you will be able to see a lot more! Download Some mods! [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) Join my Discord for more packs/mods!
